properties.name: vision.enabled
properties.description: Whether Spring Vision is enabled.

properties.name: vision.backend
properties.description: The vision backend to use (opencv, mediapipe, yolo).

properties.name: vision.opencv.enabled
properties.description: Whether OpenCV backend is enabled.

properties.name: vision.opencv.face-cascade-path
properties.description: Path to the face detection cascade classifier.

properties.name: vision.opencv.confidence-threshold
properties.description: Confidence threshold for detections (0.0 to 1.0).

properties.name: vision.opencv.min-face-size-ratio
properties.description: Minimum face size ratio relative to image size.

properties.name: vision.opencv.max-face-size-ratio
properties.description: Maximum face size ratio relative to image size.

properties.name: vision.opencv.gpu-acceleration
properties.description: Whether to enable GPU acceleration (if available).

properties.name: vision.opencv.max-image-size
properties.description: Maximum image size in bytes for processing.

properties.name: vision.health.enabled
properties.description: Whether health monitoring is enabled.

properties.name: vision.health.check-interval
properties.description: Health check interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: vision.health.max-response-time
properties.description: Maximum response time for health checks in milliseconds.

properties.name: vision.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Whether metrics collection is enabled.

properties.name: vision.metrics.collection-interval
properties.description: Metrics collection interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: vision.metrics.detailed
properties.description: Whether to include detailed metrics.

properties.name: vision.deepface.enabled
properties.description: Whether DeepFace backend is enabled.

properties.name: vision.deepface.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the DeepFace REST API.

properties.name: vision.deepface.model-name
properties.description: Default model name for DeepFace requests.

properties.name: vision.deepface.detector-backend
properties.description: Default detector backend for DeepFace requests.

properties.name: vision.deepface.distance-metric
properties.description: Default distance metric for DeepFace verification.

properties.name: vision.deepface.connect-timeout
properties.description: HTTP connection timeout in milliseconds for DeepFace backend.

properties.name: vision.deepface.read-timeout
properties.description: HTTP read timeout in milliseconds for DeepFace backend.

values.description: OpenCV backend for computer vision operations.
MediaPipe backend for ML-based vision operations (not yet implemented).
YOLO backend for real-time object detection (not yet implemented).
DeepFace REST backend that proxies to external DeepFace API.
Low confidence threshold (more detections, lower accuracy).
Medium confidence threshold (balanced accuracy and recall).
High confidence threshold (fewer detections, higher accuracy).
